overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist running through an ancient Mediterranean city at night. The character navigates torch-lit stone streets, narrow alleys, and interior courtyards with classical architecture.

events.description: character turns left from open plaza into narrow street between buildings

agents.ego_description: hooded character runs across the plaza and turns into a narrow side street

entered.detail: large classical temple with columns and statue on raised platform
multi-story stone building with balconies and lit windows
large burning brazier on stone pedestal providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide plaza at night, dominated by a grand classical temple with a statue visible in the distance. The character runs forward across cobblestones, passing between stone townhouses, then turns left into a narrower street. Torchlight illuminates the scene with warm orange against the cool blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: sprinting through narrow alleyway between stone buildings

notable_agents.action: civilian walking away in the distance down the alley

entered.detail: tight stone walls of residential buildings creating narrow passage
green shrubs and plants growing along building walls

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow, winding alley between tall stone buildings. Vegetation grows along the walls, and the space is dimly lit by wall-mounted torches. A few NPCs are visible in the distance, and the atmosphere is intimate and enclosed compared to the open plaza.

events.description: character begins ascending wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: running up stone stairs while passing a child descending

notable_agents.action: child running down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn surfaces leading upward between buildings
building facade with horizontal red and cream stripes

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase between closely packed buildings. A child NPC runs down the stairs past the character. The walls feature decorative striped patterns, and the lighting becomes warmer and more enclosed as the character moves upward into a more sheltered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with shops and awnings

events.description: emerges from narrow passage onto wider main street with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: sprinting along wider street passing under canvas awnings

entered.detail: tall building with green painted trim and multiple balconies
large red fabric awning extending over the street from building facade
classical columned structure visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wider main street lined with multi-story buildings featuring shops and red canvas awnings. The space opens up compared to the previous narrow passages, with classical architecture visible in the distance. The street is paved with irregular stones and relatively empty of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with trellis and greenery

agents.ego_description: running through narrow passage covered with vegetation and wooden structures

entered.detail: lattice wooden structure covered with climbing vines and plants
dense red flowering plants along the left wall
lit lanterns suspended across the narrow passage ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a very narrow passage densely decorated with vegetation. A wooden trellis covered in vines lines the right wall, while flowering bushes grow on the left. The passage feels intimate and sheltered, with hanging lanterns providing warm illumination ahead.

events.description: character enters interior courtyard through archway

agents.ego_description: walking into interior courtyard and observing the seated figures

notable_agents.action: two figures seated on benches around a brazier

entered.detail: tall classical stone columns supporting the courtyard roof structure
wooden benches and tables arranged around the courtyard perimeter
large mature tree growing from the center of the courtyard
metal fire pit with flames providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a beautiful interior peristyle courtyard through an archway. The space features tall stone columns, a central tree, and mosaic flooring. NPCs sit on benches around a burning brazier to the left. The atmosphere is peaceful and domestic, transitioning from the exterior streets to an intimate indoor garden space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit ancient city, transitioning from wide public plazas into increasingly intimate alleys and finally into a secluded interior courtyard. It begins in a grand plaza dominated by a classical temple, moving across cobblestones and between townhouses before turning into a narrow, winding alley where vegetation clings to the stone walls. As the character ascends a wide stone staircase past a running child, the space briefly opens onto a main street lined with red canvas awnings and multi-story shops. The scene then shifts back into a sheltered, vine-covered passage illuminated by hanging lanterns before passing through an archway. Finally, the camera enters a peaceful peristyle courtyard featuring tall columns, mosaic flooring, and a central tree surrounding a burning brazier.
